steps.title: Spot the core requirement
steps.content: The goal asks to specify a LOCATION where Caspian terns stop. Specifying means naming a particular place, not describing general behavior.

steps.title: Find the choice that names the location
steps.content: Choice D names the exact location—the Great Salt Lake in northern Utah—where Caspian terns stop during migration. Choices A and B lack any location, while C mentions only “salty waters” without the specific place name. This matches choice D — D is correct.
